ai_summary: Carraro India Limited announced the resignation of Mr. Vijay Raman, their Director of Purchase & Supply Chain Management and a Senior Management Personnel, effective June 19, 2026. Mr. Raman resigned to pursue a new career opportunity, with both the company and the executive confirming there are no other material reasons for his departure. While the departure of a key senior executive in a critical operational role could lead to temporary disruption in supply chain management, this disclosure presents no immediate red flags signaling internal corporate issues.
